---
pagetitle: "Bridge — Orientation"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-head">
  <div class="page-eyebrow">
    <svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none"><path d="M 32 6 L 32 58" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="1"/><path d="M 32 14 Q 38 12 46 10" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/><ellipse cx="46" cy="10" rx="6" ry="2.5" transform="rotate(-25 46 10)" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/><path d="M 32 22 Q 26 20 18 18" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/><ellipse cx="18" cy="18" rx="6" ry="2.5" transform="rotate(25 18 18)" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/><path d="M 32 30 Q 38 28 46 26" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/><ellipse cx="46" cy="26" rx="6" ry="2.5" transform="rotate(-25 46 26)" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/><path d="M 32 38 Q 26 36 18 34" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/><ellipse cx="18" cy="34" rx="6" ry="2.5" transform="rotate(25 18 34)" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/><path d="M 32 46 Q 38 44 46 42" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/><ellipse cx="46" cy="42" rx="6" ry="2.5" transform="rotate(-25 46 42)" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/><ellipse cx="32" cy="8" rx="3" ry="5" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/></svg>
    <span>§ Bridge · Orientation</span>
  </div>
  <div>
    <h1 class="page-title">How to use this site</h1>
    <p class="page-dek">Sense-Making is a way of asking. This site is a four-stop walk — theory, method, instrument, examples — built around a working tool.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-body">
  <div class="bridge-intro">
    <p class="bridge-lede">
      Most research questions presuppose the bridge before they have diagnosed the gap. They ask <em>which feature</em> when they should ask <em>what stopped you</em>. They ask <em>why</em> when they should ask <em>walk me through the moment</em>. The cost is data that confirms the question instead of revealing the situation.
    </p>
    <p class="bridge-lede">
      Dervin understood something most researchers spend careers avoiding: the question is the problem, not the user. She spent fifty years building a methodology for asking better ones. When she died in 2023 I wanted to make sure it reached the people whose research would be different if they'd ever encountered it.
    </p>
    <p class="bridge-lede">
      The site you're on is a reading of her work and a working instrument that applies it. The top layer is practical: how to ask, rewrite, interview, and diagnose. The deeper layer marks where Dervin's own formulations end and this course's teaching syntheses or applied extensions begin. Read at your own pace, or skip to <a href="index.html" style="color:#7a4d22;text-decoration:underline;text-decoration-style:dotted;text-underline-offset:3px">the rewriter</a> and come back.
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="bridge-path">
    <a href="theory.html" class="bridge-step">
      <span class="bridge-step-n">I</span>
      <div>
        <div class="bridge-step-t">Theory</div>
        <div class="bridge-step-d">Dervin's central metaphor: a person crossing a gap in space-time. Her insight in one diagram, with source notes for the course synthesis.</div>
        <div class="bridge-step-go">Read theory →</div>
      </div>
    </a>
    <a href="method.html" class="bridge-step">
      <span class="bridge-step-n">II</span>
      <div>
        <div class="bridge-step-t">Method</div>
        <div class="bridge-step-d">Practitioner gap pictures — course labels for noticing how movement gets stopped, grounded where possible in Dervin's movement-state framing.</div>
        <div class="bridge-step-go">Study method →</div>
      </div>
    </a>
    <a href="index.html" class="bridge-step">
      <span class="bridge-step-n">III</span>
      <div>
        <div class="bridge-step-t">Practice</div>
        <div class="bridge-step-d">Paste any question into the rewriter. See what it presupposes; receive a Sense-Making rewrite and a tentative practitioner label.</div>
        <div class="bridge-step-go">Open instrument →</div>
      </div>
    </a>
    <a href="fieldwork.html" class="bridge-step">
      <span class="bridge-step-n">IV</span>
      <div>
        <div class="bridge-step-t">Fieldwork</div>
        <div class="bridge-step-d">Worked examples — surveys, interviews, and post-mortems rewritten as applied practice, with ethics notes.</div>
        <div class="bridge-step-go">See examples →</div>
      </div>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```
